titleStmt.title: Kacؤپkإ«ل¹­i plates, time of Nandivarman, year 22

licence.p: This work is licenced under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.head: Plates

lg.l:
satyam anantam anؤپdi jأ±ؤپnؤپ
tmakam ekam amل¹›ta-padaM .

sadyaل¸¥ pravل¹›ddhena punar ba
ler mmakhe

maulؤپv i
ndudharaل¸¥ phaل¹‡ؤپadharadharaل¸¥ skandhe bhavؤپnؤ«dharo
mإ«rttoau dhإ«ل¸·idharo gaل¸·e garadharaل¸¥ keإ›eل¹£u veل¹‡ؤ«dharaل¸¥

pؤپل¹‡oau إ›إ«ladharo haraل¸¥
puraharaل¸¥ puل¹£ل¹‡ؤپtu vo maل¹…galamآ· .
ye devؤپ divi dؤپna-yؤپga-tapasؤپل¹پ kؤپle phalan tanvate

ye devؤپ bhuvi ل¹£aل¹­آ·su
karmmasu ratؤپs satyؤپإ›iل¹£as saل¹پyanؤپstؤپل¸¥
te devؤپ dvitaye kula-kram-abhuvؤپ bhaktyؤپ samؤپrؤپdhitؤپل¸¥

pؤپ
yؤپsuل¸¥ parameإ›varؤپإ› cirataraل¹پ إ›rؤ«-pallavؤپnؤپل¹پ kulam . 8

div.p: svasti . namaل¸¥ إ›riyai .

lg.l:
tasmؤپd aل¹پgiraso girؤپل¹پ . rasanidhirnnؤ«tiprajؤپ
nؤپm patiإ›

div.p:
tataل¸¥ prabhل¹›ty akha
ل¹‡ل¸چa-kala-bhuvana-maل¹‡ل¸چalؤپntma-sؤپt-karaل¹‡ؤپkhaل¹‡ل¸چita-vikrama-paraل¸¥ paripؤپlita-sakala-varل¹‡ل¹‡ؤپإ›rama-vyavasthؤپ
viإ›eل¹£aل¸¥ prababhaviل¹£ل¹‡uل¸¥rviل¹£ل¹‡oraل¹پإ›ؤپvatؤپra hؤپiva vaل¹پإ›ؤپvatؤپraل¸¥ pallavؤپnؤپnnikhilabhuvanapؤپva
natayؤپ gaل¹پgؤپvatؤپra Iva ca nirmmalas samavarttata

yatrodbhإ«tؤپل¸¥ sarvvepi sarvvatrؤپvihataإ›aktayo
mahؤپsenؤپل¸¥ pؤپvakajanmؤپnaل¸¥ pandmodbhavؤپssubrahmaل¹‡yؤپل¸¥ kumؤپrؤپ Iva ye gbhujabalavipulapra
tؤپpؤپnalaإ›oل¹£itؤپإ›eل¹£adviل¹£adavؤپryyؤپavؤ«yyryؤپل¹‡ل¹‡rل¹‡avؤپrل¹‡ل¹‡asaل¸¥ prakؤ«rل¹‡ل¹‡anirmmalakؤ«rtticandri
kؤپniل¹£kؤپlsitasakalakalikؤپlakalaل¹…kakؤپluل¹£yؤپل¸¥ samunnatacaritؤپtiإ›ayؤپcaloda
yasaل¹پvarddhitamitramaل¹‡ل¸چalؤپnurؤپgؤپ yuvatijanahل¹›dayahariل¹‡avؤپgurؤپyamؤپل¹‡apuvapuل¸¥
saundaryyؤپإ›candanatarava Iva dakل¹£iل¹‡ؤپإ›ؤپvivarddhamؤپnasaurabhؤپssuratarava Ivؤپnanyatejovilaل¹پ
ل¹پ ghitؤپntmacchؤپyؤپل¸¥ pإ«ل¹£aل¹‡a Iva parahitakarؤپ bhؤپsvantaإ›ca إ›abdؤپgamؤپ Iva prakل¹›tipratyayؤپgamopetؤپ
nirapavؤپndavrirل¹›ddhiguل¹‡eؤپإ›ca nandanؤپ Avpyapؤپrijؤپtؤپ ghanؤپgamؤپ Avpyajaل¸·ؤپإ›cakravؤپل¸·aparvvataparyyantؤپل¹پ
ل¹پ saptadvؤ«pasaptasؤپgarؤپlaل¹پkل¹›tؤپل¹پ sakalؤپndivamiva divaspeatiل¸¥r gbhuvamل¹پ bhuvaspatayo gbhuأ±jate

ye
ل¹£ؤپأ± ca samasta-إ›ؤپastra-إ›aؤپstra-nirjjitorjjita-samitayaل¸¥ Aؤپ 'mitavikramؤپل¸¥ kramؤپrjjitadharmmaka
rmmؤپل¹‡ؤپaل¸¥ khaل¹‡ل¸چitakalayaل¸¥ paل¹‡ل¸چitamatayaل¸¥o lakل¹£itamإ«rttayo rakل¹£itakؤ«ttrtayassل¸¥ samastavasundharo
dvahanadhurandharaskandhؤپل¸¥ skandavarmmakalaindavarmmakؤپل¹‡agopaviل¹£ل¹‡ugopavؤ«rakإ«ccrcavؤ«rasiل¹پhasiل¹پha
varmmaviل¹£ل¹‡usiل¹پhaprabhل¹›tayaإ›إ›atrudhإ«makemaketavo mitramؤپnahetavaل¸¥ sarvvamaryyؤپdؤپsentavaل¸¥
ketage vyantؤ«yuravanipatayaل¸¥ .

lg.l:
samprؤپpteo narasiل¹پ
hatؤپل¹پ svavapuل¹£ؤپ nؤپmnؤپ ca digvyؤپpinؤپ
mؤپnyo nayena mnanu taل¹پ saل¹پprati nandivarmmؤپ

devaل¸¥ إ›rؤ«buddhava
rmmؤپ budhajanamahitaل¸¥ paأ±camaل¸¥ pallavendraل¸¥

saل¹پgrؤپme vijayaل¸¥ kalؤپpa
ricaye karل¹‡ل¹‡ؤ«sutaل¸¥ kؤپrmmuke

kؤپmo
vؤپmavilocanؤپsu kavitؤپbadndhe sa ؤ€dyaل¸¥ kavis
svؤپmؤ« naل¸¥ pallavؤپnؤپل¹پ kula-bharaل¹‡a-paل¹­us sؤپtvikas sؤپrvva-bhaumo

div.p:
tena rؤپjؤپdhirؤپjaparame
إ›vareل¹‡a parameإ›varapotarؤپjapadapraإ›ؤپsanapareل¹‡a paramapadaviل¹£aktavyؤپpل¹›tonnidrace
tasؤپ parameل¹£ل¹­hipadapaل¹پkaruhayugaل¸·avigaل¸·itadhإ«ل¸·idhإ«saraإ›irasؤپ vpuvaraskل¹›tadevabrؤپ
hmaل¹‡apإ«janؤپsanena tiraskل¹›takalikؤپlakalikؤپpiل¸·anؤپvyasanena vivarddhamؤپnapratؤپ
pؤپnalapariإ›oل¹£itؤپmitramaل¹‡ل¸چalena vivarddhamؤپnؤپnurؤپgarasaparitoل¹£itamitramaل¹‡ل¸چale
na sakalabhuvanasؤپmrؤپjyadؤ«kل¹£ؤپdakل¹£adakل¹£iل¹‡akareل¹‡a sarvvorvvؤ«bhraل¹›nmakuل¹­amؤپل¹‡ikkyakoل¹‡aإ›ؤپل¹‡a
masل¹›ل¹‡itacaraل¹‡ayugaل¸·ena pallavakulanandanavanalakل¹£mؤ«latؤپlaل¸·itaveل¹£ل¹­anakalpavل¹›kل¹£e
ل¹‡a kل¹£atriyamallena pallavamallena bappabhaل¹­ل¹­ؤپrakapؤپdؤپnuddhyؤپnavarddhamؤپnamahimnؤپ
nandivarmmanؤپmnؤپ mahؤپguل¹‡asalilanidhisalilasamل¹پvarddhanasomarؤپjena mahؤپrؤپjena sؤپ
mrؤپjyasaل¹پvatsare dvؤپviل¹پإ›e varttamؤپne chandaل¸¥pؤپrؤپvؤپrapؤپragؤپya svarasamadhurasؤپmagؤپya chandaل¸¥kalpa
vyؤپkaraل¹‡ajyotiل¹£aniruktaإ›ikل¹£ؤپcchandovicaitiل¹£aل¸چaل¹پgasaل¹پإ›itasvؤپddhyؤپyؤپddhyaya
nؤپyapadadharmavؤپkyadharmmavastaudharmmavittؤپyade إ›rutismل¹›tirasؤپyanapؤپnؤپya karmmakؤپل¹‡ل¸چajأ±ؤپ
nakؤپل¹‡ل¸چapaل¹‡ل¸چitؤپya lokayuktikalؤپrakoauإ›alؤپpeإ›alؤپya kؤپvyanؤپل¹­akؤپkhyؤپyaike
tihؤپsapurؤپل¹‡apariل¹‡atؤپya kimbahunؤپ sarvvajأ±ؤپnavijأ±ؤپnatniل¹£ل¹‡ؤپtؤپyva sarvvakarmmؤپnuل¹£ل¹­hؤپnaniل¹£ل¹­hi
tؤپya suvل¹›ttؤپya bhuvanabhavanadؤ«pؤپya mؤپnؤپbhijanؤپasujanؤپya nirؤپkل¹›tasamapstatamastayؤپma
ddhyamalokaikamitrؤپya lokamitreل¹‡a sarvvaguل¹‡asؤپrasandohasؤپgaragambhؤ«reل¹‡a إ›rؤ«ma
tؤپ hrؤ«matؤپ vapuل¹£matؤپyuل¹£matؤپ paruل¹£etarabhؤپل¹£eل¹‡a puruل¹£aviإ›eل¹£eل¹‡a braل¹›haspati
neva divaspaterbbhuvaspaterjjananayanahل¹›dayanandino nandinaل¸¥ pallavapatennrnisa
rإ›إ›ganؤ«tivinؤ«tena vidvanmukhyena mukhyamantriل¹‡aؤپ dhؤ«reل¹‡a vؤ«reل¹‡a brahmakل¹£atramayiؤ«ل¹پ إ›rؤ«yamavi
kalؤپmavicalؤپأ±ca إ›rؤ«nandipotaraؤپjanabhaktisamamؤپcandramastؤپrakambibhrؤپل¹‡ena bibhrؤپ
ل¹‡ena kulaل¹پ kulajyeل¹£ل¹­hena jyeل¹£ل¹­haputreل¹‡a brahmaإ›rؤ«rؤپjena إ›ؤ«latassؤپkل¹£ؤپtsoma
rؤپjena tadthaiva sarvvaguل¹‡ajyoeل¹£ل¹­hena jyeل¹£ل¹­hena poؤپtreل¹‡a putriل¹‡ؤپmل¹پ poautriل¹‡ؤپأ±ل¹پ ca dhuramؤپ
ropitؤپya sujanmapuل¹‡yؤپya dvijanmaؤپgraل¹‡yؤپya brahmavedine jyeل¹£ل¹­hapؤپdasomayؤپjine cha
ndaإ›chandؤپnuvarttanؤپya chandogasإ«trؤپya bharadvؤپjapeyؤپdikratugotrؤپya bharadvؤپjagotrؤپya
toل¹‡ل¸چؤپkarؤپل¹£ل¹­rabrahmalokؤپyamؤپnapإ«niyavؤپstavyؤپya doل¹£adaridrؤپya veل¹£aviإ›iل¹£ل¹­ؤپ
yaikapuruل¹£ؤپya dvilokacintanoؤپya trivargإ›asؤپdhakؤپya caturvvedؤپya paأ±camahؤپbhإ«taparؤپ
rtthؤپya ل¹£aل¸چaل¹پgؤپya saptasaptipratimؤپya suguل¹‡ؤپya subrؤپhmaل¹‡ؤپya svayameva prasؤپdؤپ
dundivanakoل¹£ل¹­hake tasminn eva rؤپل¹£ل¹­re
prؤپmل¹… palaaiyإ«r
dakل¹£iل¹‡aإ› ca sa Eva

pratyaل¹… maل¹‡atpؤپkkaل¸¥ ko
ل¸·ل¸·ipؤپkkaإ› ca
Udaل¹… veل¸·imؤپnallإ«r

Etad-avadhi-catuل¹£ل¹­ayؤپntabbhrbhإ«taل¸¥ koل¹­ل¸چukoل¸·ل¸·iriti prathamanؤپmؤپ brahmade
yiؤ«bhؤپva Ead ekadhؤ«ramaل¹پgalamiti caramanؤپmnؤپ grؤپmassؤپmؤپnyanivarttanadvayamaryyؤپdayؤپ nirastapurؤپ
tanadevadؤپnabrahmadeyannirastakuل¹­umbi sarvvaparihؤپrؤپbhyantarؤ«karaل¹‡ena dإ«rasarito vegavatyؤپإ›ca tiؤ«ra
layataل¹­ؤپkؤپcca yathopapؤپdaل¹پ ruddhvؤپ ca Uodakabhogo graل¹›haل¹پ kل¹£etramؤپrؤپmo niل¹£kuل¹­aأ±caل¹پ ce
tyetadabhyantaraل¹پ sarvvo brahmadeyandatta Iti vijأ±aptirbrahmayuvarؤپjasya .
ؤ€jأ±aptiggr ghoraإ›armmؤپ
siddhir astuل¸¥ .

kإچ
ل¹‰ إچleai yؤپل¹‡ل¹­' iru-patt' iraل¹‡ل¹­-ؤپvatu
إھل¹ںل¹ںu-k-kؤپل¹­ل¹­u-k-kإچل¹­ل¹­attu nؤپل¹­ل¹­ؤپruل¹… kؤپل¹‡ka

tan-nؤپل¹­ل¹­u-k ko
ل¹­ukoل¸·ل¸·i muل¹‰peل¹ںل¹ںؤپrai mؤپل¹ںل¹ںi brahmatyuvarؤپcaل¹‰ viل¹‡ل¹‡appattؤپl kإچraإ›armmaل¹‰ل¹‰ ؤپ
ل¹‡atti-y-ؤپka tؤ“vatؤپل¹‰a-p-piramatؤ“yam nؤ«kki-k kuل¹­i nؤ«kki-c cؤپmؤپniya Iraل¹‡ل¹­u paل¹­ل¹­i-p pa
ل¹­iyؤپl bhؤپradvؤپja-gotrؤپya chandoga-sإ«trؤپya pإ«ni-vؤپstavyؤپya
ceل¹­ل¹­iل¹ںeل¹…ka-somayaؤپ
jikku-p piramatؤ“yam aؤپka-p paل¹‡itt-aruل¸·i viل¹­utta-t tirumukam kaل¹‡ل¹­u nؤپل¹­ل¹­om nؤپ
ل¹­ل¹­u viyavaل¹‰ colliya Elleai pإچyi paل¹­ؤپkai valaأ±-ceyitu kalluل¹… kaل¹‡ل¹‡ل¸·ل¸·iyu
n nؤپل¹­ل¹­i-k koل¹­uttataل¹ںk' elleai
kؤ«ل¸»-pؤپl elleai pؤپleaiyإ«relleIaiyiل¹‰ mؤ“ل¹ںkum
teل¹‰-pؤپl elleai pؤپleaiyإ«relleaiyiل¹‰ vaل¹­akkum
mؤ“l-pؤپl elleai maل¹‡aل¹ںpؤپkkatt' el
leaiyiل¹‰ل¹‰um koل¸·ل¸·ipؤپkkatt' elleaiyiل¹‰um kiل¸»akkum
vaل¹­a-pؤپl elleai veل¸·imؤپل¹‰a
laل¹‰llإ«r elleaiyiل¹‰ ل¹ںeل¹ںkkum
In-nؤپل¹ں-pؤ“r-elleaiyuل¸·ل¸·um Akappaل¹­ل¹­a nؤ«r'nila
ل¹‰um puل¹‰ceyiyum Uل¹­ump' إچل¹­i ؤ€mai tavaل¸»vat' ellؤپm ceyؤپل¹ںل¹ںؤپlum veل¸µkؤپ
viل¹‰ؤپlum tؤ«raiyaل¹‰eriyؤپlun nؤ«r ؤ«yinta vaل¸»i ؤ€ل¹ںل¹ںukkؤپlum veل¸·ل¸·akkؤپ
lum toل¹‡ل¹­i-k koل¹‡ل¹­' uل¹‡ل¹‡a-p peل¹ںuvؤپr ؤپkavum

Ik-kؤپlkaل¸·ukku kolkalamum
puل¸»utipؤپل¹­um peل¹ںuvat' ؤپkavum

Ik-kؤپlkaل¸·il kإ«ل¹­eai Iل¹ںeaittuل¹… kuل¹ںaل¹…k-aل¹ںuttum kuل¹ںل¹ںe
ttam paل¹‡ل¹‡iyum koل¹‡ل¹­uل¹‡ل¹­ؤپr kإچ-k koل¸·ل¸·um taل¹‡ل¹­appaل¹­u v-ؤپkavum

maل¹‰eaiyum
maل¹‰ai-p-paل¹­appum piل¹ںavum Ivarum Ivar vaل¸»ikkaل¹‡ل¹‡ؤپrum mؤپل¹­amum mؤپل¸·ikaiyum cإ«ل¹­ل¹­o
l Eل¹­utetu-k koل¹‡ل¹­' irukka-p peل¹ںuvؤپr ؤپkavum

Ivv-uل¸·ل¸·iل¹­ل¹­a sarvva-paricؤپram uل¸·ل¸·-ؤپka-p
paل¹‡ittؤ“m

Ivv-إ«r peل¹ںل¹ںa paricؤپram cekkum taل¹ںiyum Ulliya-k kإ«liyum pirؤپmaل¹‡a-rؤپ
ca-k-kؤپل¹‡amum ceل¹…koل¹­iy-k-kؤپل¹‡amum kallؤپl-k-kؤپل¹‡amum kaل¹‡ل¹‡iل¹­ل¹­u-k-kؤپل¹‡a
mum katir-k-kؤپل¹‡amum vica-k-kؤپل¹‡amum kuca-k-kؤپل¹‡amum Arikoل¸»iyum neyiyvileaiyum
puل¹­ل¹­akavileaiyum paل¹­ل¹­ikai-k-kؤپل¹‡amum Iل¹ںؤپmayiaiyum nؤپyؤپل¹­ikaل¸·um tإ«tuvarum kaل¹‡ikؤپra
ttikaل¸·um paل¹‡ل¹‡uppؤپleل¹­uppؤپrum putu-k-kutirai-k-kuل¹ںل¹ںatuveyiyum pullum I
Iل¹ںؤپmeaiyum nall-ؤپvum nall-erutum Iل¹ںؤپmayiaiyum nؤپل¹­ل¹­uvakai Iل¹ںؤپmayiaiyum paل¹­ؤپل¹…kaل¸»iyum kaiyؤپ
ل¸·um neل¹­um-puل¹ںeaiyum paل¹‰ampؤپkkum Iل¹ںؤپmayiaiyum karaل¹‡a-t-taل¹‡ل¹­amum Atikaraل¹‡a-t-ta
ل¹‡ل¹­amum pattإ«r-c-cؤپل¹ںل¹ںum Uل¸»aiyavaya-p-paل¸·ل¸·i-vattuvum Iل¹ںؤپmaiyum kuvaل¸·eai-naل¹­u-va
riyuل¹… kuvaل¸·eai-k-kؤپل¹‡amum kamukum teل¹…kum Uل¸·ل¸·iل¹­ل¹­a palluruvil palل¸»aya-maramu
m Iل¹­ل¹­aل¹‰a kؤپlkoل¹­ل¹­' iل¹ںؤپmayiaiyum koyiل¸·umutalpaل¹­iyؤپl Iل¹ںؤپtu Ivar tؤپme Uل¹‡
ل¹‡a-p peل¹ںuvؤپr ؤپkavum

nileai-k-kaل¸·attؤپrum Atikؤپrarum vؤپyikkeل¹­ppؤپrum Uل¸·ل¸· i
runtu paratatti ceل¹‰ل¹ںatu

svasti إ›rؤ«-parameإ›vara-mahؤپ-kؤپoل¹£ل¹­hakgؤپriل¹‡ؤپ likhita
M .
Ivaل¹‰ peل¹ںumaل¹‰eaiyum maل¹‰eai-p-paل¹­appum Iraل¹‡ل¹­u paل¹­ل¹­i nilaل¹‰um .

svasti
siddhir astu namaل¸¥ . . ..

app.note: notes: The kل¹£a of kل¹£iل¹‡utؤپ is the only instance in the whole inscription, in which that group looks like kل¹£a. In all other cases it resembles tل¹£a.
notes: The word nayana is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross (haل¹پsapؤپda) above the line.
notes: Read dؤ«ptؤپgniل¸¥ sa hutؤپإ›aآ؛.
notes: Read brؤپhmakulotthitopi ?
notes: The ta of vihata is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The ل¹‡ل¹‡a of vؤ«yyؤپل¹‡ل¹‡a is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line; read آ؛vؤ«ryؤپrل¹‡avؤپrل¹‡asaل¸¥.
notes: The va of vapuل¸¥ is corrected from pu.
notes: The va of Iva is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The two syllables إ›abdؤپ are entered below the line, and the place at which they have to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The ka of sakalؤپ is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The two syllables kema are already cancelled in the original by two horizontal strokes placed above them.
notes: Read kؤپle gate (?)
notes: The e of dheya appears to be corrected from vi; read vidheya.
notes: The engraver appears to have altered ل¹£ؤپل¹پko into ل¹£ؤپل¹پkaل¸¥; read آ؛ل¹£ؤپل¹…kaل¸¥ khaل¹­vؤپل¹…gaآ؛.
notes: Read svavaإ›agؤپل¹پ ?
notes: The syllable di is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: rؤپja is corrected from varmma by the engraver.
notes: Read آ؛kalikؤپlakؤپlikapؤ«ل¸چanavyasanena ?
notes: The word saل¹پvatsare is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The letter na has been already cancelled in the original by placing a horizontal stroke above it.
notes: Read آ؛yؤ«bhؤپvؤپdekaآ؛. The E of Eka is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The na of dؤپna is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.
notes: The large Leyden grant (l. 313) reads cuل¹­ل¹­oل¹­ل¹­ؤپl.
notes: This word is entered below the line, and the place at which it has to be inserted, is marked by a cross above the line.

div.p: Edited in (SII 2.73). Edited in . Text and summary in (IP 77). Sanskrit text and French translation in (B 55).
This revised edition by Emmanuel Francis, based on previous edition(s) and published visual documentation.
